chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-206 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 20-08-2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur, SIP Abid Hussain, P.S, Dadloi and ASI Fateh Muhammad Malik of P.S, Pano Akil. **** Mr. Hafeezullah Korai, Advocate files Vakalatnama as well as statement on behalf of 15 private respondents. Counsel for petitioner also places on record through his statement a copy of F.C Suit No.103 of 2024 filed by private respondent party against petitioner party. Both learned counsel for petitioner as well as counsel for private respondents have admitted that the dispute between the petitioner and private respondents is over landed property and such F.C Suit No.103 of 2024 is pending adjudication before the competent Court of law as well as FIR was lodged by one of the respondents against the petitioner party. Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of official respondents No.2,3,4 & 5, wherein they have categorically stated that no harassment shall be caused to either party and they shall act strictly in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. 2 Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to both the parties, who are also directed to pursue their abovementioned cases.

Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of official respondents No.2,3,4 & 5, wherein they have categorically stated that no harassment shall be caused to either party and they shall act strictly in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. 2 Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to both the parties, who are also directed to pursue their abovementioned cases. However, it is made clear that this order shall not come in the way of any criminal, civil, or family proceedings, if pending between the parties before the competent Courts of law. JUDGE Ahmad
